content:
🔥 Detours | C++
🎯 Primary Use Case: Monitoring and instrumenting API calls on Windows for debugging, analysis, or modifying application behavior.
✨ Key Features: • API call monitoring • API call instrumentation • Hooking Windows API calls • Source code availability • MIT License
📖 Summary: Detours is a C++ software package for monitoring and instrumenting API calls on Windows. It allows developers to intercept and modify the behavior of existing Windows API functions, enabling features like debugging, performance analysis, and application behavior modification. The project is now open-sourced under the MIT license.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
